lines: No results in the last 48 hours, you useless bastards — just one fucking fixture on the slate today, but it's a big one: France vs Spain in the semi-final, and it's basically a civil war between four sweepstake cunts at once.

Callum and Wilmot are locked together at the top on 87pts like two pricks sharing a prize they both desperately need — Callum's got France today, Wilmot's sat there with his dick in his hand because England are the only thing keeping him alive and they're not even fucking playing.

Croft (6th, 66pts) and Dene (9th, 55pts) are both riding France's coattails like desperate little freeloaders — combined they've watched every single one of their other teams get absolutely battered out of this tournament, so if Les Bleus go out today these two sad fucks are officially just spectators.

The Foreman is down in 8th on 56pts with France as his only surviving team — Colombia, Türkiye, and Curaçao all shipped home like garbage, meaning this absolute weapon is entirely dependent on a nation that isn't even his to carry him, and he still can't crack the top half of the table.

Today's watch: if Spain dump France out, Jim rockets up the standings while Callum, Croft, Dene, and The Foreman all simultaneously combust — four grown men destroyed by one Spaniard, and Jim, sitting 5th on 71pts, gets to be insufferable about it for the rest of the fucking tournament.
